name: /start for new user begins onboarding with welcome message

payload.text:
Hi Test, welcome to Crypto Digest.

I'll send you 1–3 curated crypto news summaries each day. First, let's set your delivery time.
At what local time should I send your daily digest? Tap a preset or type your own time (e.g., /time 08:30).

name: /start for returning user shows menu with delivery time

payload.text:
Hi Test, welcome to Crypto Digest.

I'll send you 1–3 curated crypto news summaries each day. First, let's set your delivery time.

Welcome back, Test. Your digest is scheduled for 09:00 (UTC).

What would you like to do?

name: /help explains the bot in plain language

payload.text:
ℹ️ Tap /start to open the menu, then pick what you want from the buttons.

Everything in this bot is reachable by tapping — you don't need to remember any commands.

name: Help menu button shows same help text

payload.text:
ℹ️ Tap /start to open the menu, then pick what you want from the buttons.

name: menu:main shows main menu for returning user
